old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.2","title":"Fix RPL rank and counter semantics","description":"Resolve review findings in the recovered RPL hardening: compare DAGRank rather than raw Rank for parent admissibility; treat MaxRankIncrease=0 as disabled; reject ranks below ROOT_RANK; support RFC circular-counter wrap 127-\u003e0 for DIO/DAO comparison and generation; reject local RPLInstanceID encodings with the embedded D bit set.","acceptance_criteria":"RFC-derived literal boundary tests cover DAGRank equality, MaxRankIncrease zero, sub-root rank rejection, 127-\u003e0 comparison and DAO generation, and invalid 0xC0..0xFF local instance values in parse/write paths; RPL tests and Clippy pass; three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:47:12.592233Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T21:47:12.592233Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:47:12.715325Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Implemented RFC-derived fixes with literal regression tests; combined gates pass 99 lichen-rpl tests, 143 lichen-node std tests, RPL all-feature Clippy, formatting, and repeated independent review cycles.
